item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 2min “I never thought I would be here. I still feel like Michael is the Dutch No.1 because of all th
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 2min “I never thought I would be here. I still feel like Michael is the Dutch No.1 because of all the things he has done for the sport in my country.”
Gian van Veen went from beer-soaked fan in Rotterdam to a Premier League headliner.
Full story: https:// oche180.com/van-veen-goes- from-beer-soaked-fan-to-premier-league-headliner/ … Mostrar más 24

item.title: pistol147: Mark Allen @pistol147 · 6min Running a competition for 2 tickets for my match Saturday morning and Sunday morning plus h
item.description:
Mark Allen @pistol147 · 6min Running a competition for 2 tickets for my match Saturday morning and Sunday morning plus hotel stay in Sheffield Saturday night
Question….. what is my lowest score round an 18 hole golf course????
Winner picked tonight at 10pm
Good luck everyone

item.description:
Josh reposteó Target Darts @TargetDarts · 26min A new era for Target China!
Our store in Shanghai is now open, and the event was one to behold.
If you ever find yourself in the area, make sure you swing by and check it out!
#TeamTarget 4 7 1 mil
